case_title: SELLICK, BRENT L. VS LANDFRIED, SHIRLEY R.

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 465738 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRENT L. AS TO DEFENDANT LANDFRIED, SHIRLEY R.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRENT L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
